title: Sparganium friesii
taxonomy: Sparganium friesii is classified within the family Sparganiaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as bur-reeds. This family consists of about 85 species, with Sparganium friesii being one of the species found in wetland environments. The genus Sparganium is further divided into several species, with Sparganium friesii being a species found in North America. The plant is often categorized as a wetland perennial herb, growing in a variety of aquatic habitats. It belongs to the class Liliopsida, which is a group of monocots.
